title: Initialize Git & Push Scaffold
description: Create branch 'feature/anti-rabbit-hole' from current HEAD. No new files to scaffold — this is a modification to existing code.

title: Rewrite system prompt and prompt builder in prompts.py
description: In backend/app/agents/prompts.py: (1) Rewrite GENERATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT — remove Rule 5 'go deeper', add anti-rabbit-hole guidelines that prioritize breadth-first exploration, instruct each question to independently contribute a new data point. (2) Extend build_generator_prompt() — add question_number:int=1 and max_questions:int=10 parameters, add 'Survey Progress' section showing question N of M with remaining count, add 'Topics Already Explored' section after conversation history telling the LLM to not revisit the same subtopic as the last exchange, update task instruction to demand NEW insights for the research goal.

title: Add context relevance and topic drift checks to validator.py
description: In backend/app/agents/validator.py: (1) Raise goal_alignment_threshold default from 0.3 to 0.45. (2) Add context_similarity_threshold=0.7 and topic_drift_threshold=0.80 to __init__. (3) Add check_context_relevance(question, context, threshold) method — embedding similarity between candidate question and survey.context, reject if below threshold. (4) Add check_topic_drift(question, prior_questions) method — embedding similarity between candidate and LAST question only (not all prior), reject if > topic_drift_threshold with message about rabbit-holing. (5) Wire both new checks into validate() — context relevance after goal alignment, topic drift after context relevance.

title: Pass question_number through generator_agent.py
description: In backend/app/agents/generator_agent.py: (1) Add question_number:int=1 parameter to generate_question(). (2) Pass question_number and survey.max_questions to build_generator_prompt() call.

title: Compute and pass question_number in question_service.py
description: In backend/app/services/question_service.py: (1) Compute question_number = session.question_count + 1 BEFORE calling generate_question(). (2) Pass question_number to generate_question().

title: Update and add tests for all changes
description: Update backend/tests/: (1) test_validator.py — add test_check_context_relevance_passes (mock embeddings same direction, verify passes), test_check_context_relevance_fails (mock embeddings opposite direction, verify rejection with 'context' in reason), test_check_topic_drift_detects_rabbit_hole (mock last question same embedding, verify rejection with 'rabbit-holing' in reason), test_check_topic_drift_passes_diverse (mock different embeddings, verify passes). Also update FakeSurvey in validate tests to include context attribute. (2) test_generator_agent.py — update test_generate_question_with_history to verify prompt contains 'Survey Progress', update _make_fake_survey to include max_questions. (3) test_services.py — update any mocks of generate_question to accept question_number parameter. (4) Run all tests and ensure they pass.

title: Review backend changes
description: Review all modified files in backend/app/agents/ and backend/app/services/ for: correctness of embedding threshold values, proper error handling in new validator methods, backward compatibility of new parameters, prompt quality and clarity, code style consistency.

title: Architecture review — verify no API breakage
description: Verify: (1) No API contract changes — request/response schemas unchanged. (2) All new function parameters have defaults — backward compatible. (3) New validator checks fail gracefully on embedding errors. (4) Overall approach correctly addresses rabbit-holing without over-constraining generation.

title: Commit and push feature branch
description: Stage all modified files, commit with message 'feat: anti-rabbit-hole question focus — breadth-first generation, topic drift detection, context relevance validation', push to feature/anti-rabbit-hole branch.
